title: At the Playground
summary: Two children meet at the playground and decide to play together on the swings and slide.

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: Hi! My name is Lily. What is your name?

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Hi! I am Max. Do you go to Sunshine School?

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: No, I go to Green Park School. This is my first time at this playground.

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Oh, welcome! This playground is really fun. My favourite thing is the slide.

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: The slide looks great! It is very tall. Is it scary?

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Not at all! It is very fast. You will love it. Do you want to try?

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: Yes, please! But can we go on the swings first? I love swings.

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Sure! The swings are over there. Race you!

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: Hey, wait for me! You are so fast!

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Ha ha! I win! You can have this swing. It is the best one.

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: Thank you! I can go really high on the swings. Watch me!

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Wow, you are so high! Are you not scared?

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: No, I love the feeling! It is like flying. Do you want to swing too?

body.speaker: Child1
body.text: I cannot reach. You are too high already! Let's go on the slide now.

body.speaker: Child2
body.text: Good idea! Last one to the top is a rotten egg!

annotations.exampleEn: It is my first time riding a bicycle.
The children ran to the slide at the playground.
The dark forest looked scary at night.
Are you tired? Not at all, I feel great!
She loves playing on the swings at the park.
Hey, wait for me! I am coming.
I love the feeling of the wind in my hair.
Jumping on the trampoline feels like flying.
She cannot reach the top shelf because she is short.

annotations.meaningVi: quả trứng thối (dùng trong trò chơi trẻ em để chỉ người đến sau cùng)
annotations.exampleEn: Last one to the pool is a rotten egg!
The toilets are over there, near the entrance.

grammarNotes.title: Suggestions and invitations with 'Do you want to' and 'Let's'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: 'Do you want to + verb' dùng để mời hoặc hỏi: 'Do you want to try?' / 'Do you want to swing too?' 'Let's + verb' dùng để đề xuất làm gì cùng nhau: 'Let's go on the slide now.' Đây là những cách nói phổ biến nhất khi chơi với bạn bè.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: 'Do you want to + verb' invites or asks: 'Do you want to try?' / 'Do you want to swing too?' 'Let's + verb' proposes a shared action: 'Let's go on the slide now.' These are the most common ways to make suggestions when playing with friends.

grammarNotes.title: Exclamations and emphasis
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Trong tiếng Anh, câu cảm thán thường dùng 'so' + tính từ hoặc 'very' + tính từ để nhấn mạnh: 'You are so fast!' / 'You are so high!' / 'It is very fast.' / 'It is very tall.' Dấu chấm than (!) đi kèm với câu cảm thán.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: English exclamations often use 'so' + adjective or 'very' + adjective for emphasis: 'You are so fast!' / 'You are so high!' / 'It is very fast.' / 'It is very tall.' Exclamation marks (!) are used with these sentences.

translationVi: Bé1: Chào! Tên tôi là Lily. Bạn tên gì? Bé2: Chào! Tôi là Max. Bạn có học trường Sunshine không? Bé1: Không, tôi học trường Green Park. Đây là lần đầu tiên tôi đến sân chơi này. Bé2: Ồ, chào mừng bạn! Sân chơi này vui lắm. Thứ tôi thích nhất là cầu trượt. Bé1: Cầu trượt trông tuyệt! Nó rất cao. Có đáng sợ không? Bé2: Không chút nào! Nó rất nhanh. Bạn sẽ thích thôi. Bạn có muốn thử không? Bé1: Vâng! Nhưng chúng ta có thể chơi xích đu trước không? Tôi thích xích đu. Bé2: Được thôi! Xích đu ở đằng kia. Đua với bạn nào! Bé1: Này, đợi tôi với! Bạn nhanh quá! Bé2: Ha ha! Tôi thắng! Bạn có thể lấy cái xích đu này. Nó là cái tốt nhất. Bé1: Cảm ơn! Tôi có thể đung đưa rất cao. Nhìn tôi nè! Bé2: Ồ, bạn cao quá! Bạn không sợ sao? Bé1: Không, tôi thích cảm giác này! Nó giống như đang bay. Bạn có muốn đung đưa không? Bé2: Được! Đẩy tôi cao hơn đi nào! Bé1: Tôi không với tới được. Bạn đã cao quá rồi! Chúng ta đi cầu trượt đi. Bé2: Ý hay! Ai đến đỉnh sau cùng là quả trứng thối!

questions.prompt: What school does Max go to?
What school does Lily go to?
What is Max's favourite thing at the playground?
What does Lily want to do first?
questions.explanation: 'Can we go on the swings first? I love swings.'
questions.hint: Find what Lily asks to do first.

questions.prompt: What does Max do when they race to the swings?
questions.hint: Find the result of the race.

questions.prompt: What does Lily say swinging feels like?
questions.hint: Find Lily's description of the feeling.

questions.prompt: What does Max ask Lily to do?
Why can't Lily push Max higher?
questions.explanation: 'I cannot reach. You are too high already!'

questions.prompt: What do they decide to do after the swings?
What does Max say at the very end?
options: Last one to the top is a rotten egg
questions.explanation: 'Last one to the top is a rotten egg!'

blanks.explanation: 'This is my first time at this playground.'
'It is very tall. Is it scary?'
'Can we go on the swings first?'
'I can go really high on the swings.'

criticalThinkingQuestion: Lily and Max become friends quickly at the playground. Why do you think it is easy for children to make friends while playing? How can you make a new friend in a new place?
